title: ziziphus napeca var. lucida
intro: Ziziphus napeca var. lucida, also known as the Lucid Jujube or Chinese Date, is a variety of the Jujube plant native to China. This shrub-like plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ziziphus napeca var. lucida include improving sleep quality, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting immune function. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as tea, capsules, and tinctures, and is also consumed as a dried fruit or fresh fruit, with the latter often eaten raw or used in cooking.
